title: How to How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a Nigerian ebook author blocked from selling your digital book on PayPal? Do you live in Ghana and can't use Stripe to sell your course templates? You're not alone. Millions of digital creators worldwide face similar geo-restrictions, banking limitations, or Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements that lock them out of popular platforms like Gumroad and Payhip. It's time to break free and start selling your digital products with crypto.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The automated delivery pipeline for digital products works in a specific sequence that eliminates every manual step. A buyer visits your store, selects a product, and initiates payment. The Web3 Wallet Connect module displays a QR code with the wallet address and the exact amount in their chosen coin, converted from USD at the current exchange rate. The buyer sends the payment. NOWPayments detects the on-chain transaction and fires a webhook to the Core Shop Engine. The engine verifies the payment amount and confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain. It generates a PDF receipt with the order details and sends the download link to the buyer's email address. The entire process completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need to set up a few things. First, create a digital product, such as an ebook, course, or template, that you're willing to sell. Next, choose a cryptocurrency payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins. Finally, get the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, which will allow buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency with a simple QR code scan.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to integrate your chosen payment processor with your digital product. This can be done using the Shop Engine backend, which automates the delivery of your product to the buyer once payment is received. You'll also need to set up a secure and automated delivery system, such as automated PDF receipt generation, to ensure that buyers receive their products instantly.
You can sell digital products in any currency, without being limited by traditional payment processors.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live. Create a sales page for your digital product, and use the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration to display a QR code that buyers can use to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. As buyers pay, the Shop Engine backend will automatically deliver your product to their wallets, and you'll receive the payment in your chosen cryptocurrency.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your sales start to roll in, it's time to scale your operation. This can be done by setting up additional payment processors, integrating with more digital product platforms, and expanding your marketing efforts to reach more buyers. With the Shop Engine backend and Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, you'll have the flexibility to scale your business quickly and easily, without having to worry about restrictive payment terms or fees.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
The Shop Engine backend automates delivery of your product, so you can focus on marketing and sales.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a platform to sell digital downloads without fees, you might also be interested in using the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce, which includes the Shop Engine backend, Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, and Admin Dashboard. Check out the shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products with crypto, follow these steps: create a digital product, choose a cryptocurrency payment processor, integrate your payment processor with your digital product, set up a secure and automated delivery system, create a sales page, and display a Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration QR code that buyers can use to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency.
Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration lets buyers pay in their preferred cryptocurrency with a simple QR code scan.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
